title: TCS Bets $7 BILLION on AI
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

TCS is investing a massive $7 BILLION to build 1 Gigawatt of AI Data Center capacity across India. This move follows their first-ever revenue decline, signalling a huge commitment to the future. CEO K. Krithivasan says the goal is to make India a global AI compute hub. This isn't just an investment, but a declaration that the future of TCS and Indian tech is AI-led. What does this massive AI investment mean for your job?
